intro: Aetheolaena mojandensis, also known as the Mojadense plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Aetheolaena mojandensis include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
